infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
**HEALTHY**

All 10/10 collectors enabled. Data fresh through Friday extended-hours close (~00:55Z Sat). Weekend — markets closed, no new data expected until Monday pre-market (~09:00Z). Broker healthy. Portfolio empty — no live trading risk. 7 active tasks idle (normal weekend behavior). No active issues.

## Market Context
Saturday 2026-03-07, 22:02Z. Weekend — US equity markets closed. Last trading session: Friday 2026-03-06. Extended hours ended ~00:55Z Sat for large-caps, ~22:35Z Fri for ESTC. Next market open: Monday 2026-03-09 pre-market ~09:00Z (4:00 AM ET).

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | TF | Disabled | Data Fresh | Last Bar | Last Price | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|----|----------|------------|----------|------------|----------|-------|
| `[[collector/e5125995]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/GLD]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $475.50 | **Critical** (4 tasks) | 59 bars 20:00Z Fri–00:55Z Sat. Extended-hours complete. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 22:35Z Fri | 22:35Z Fri | $53.86 | **Important** (3 tasks) | 14 bars 20:00–22:35Z Fri. Normal small-cap early close. |
| `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 15min | No | ✅ 22:30Z Fri | 22:30Z Fri | $53.86 | Low | 6 bars. Consistent with 5min. |
| `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SLV]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $76.47 | Low | 59 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/3d04a943]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/NVDA]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $178.03 | Low | 59 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/999b208d]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SPY]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $671.30 | Low | 59 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/9c417caa]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/QQQ]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $598.80 | Low | 59 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/c00fd831]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/AAPL]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $257.00 | Low | 53 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/f60d4dce]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/IWM]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $250.13 | Low | 55 bars. No active tasks. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/XLE]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 00:55Z Sat | 00:55Z Sat | $56.70 | Low | 58 bars. No active tasks. |

**Summary:** 10/10 collectors enabled, all produced data through Friday extended-hours close. GLD critical path clean. Weekend gap is normal.

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | ✅ Healthy | paper-api.alpaca.markets, SIP data feed. Config verified. |

## Active Optimization Tasks
| Task | Asset | Selection | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|--------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` | GLD | nsga3 | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` | GLD | spea2-rp | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` | GLD | spea2-rp | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` | GLD | spea2-rp | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` | ESTC | nsga3 | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` | ESTC | spea2-rp | ✅ Idle (weekend) |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` | ESTC | spea2-rp | ✅ Idle (weekend) |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| — | None | — | — | — |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| `[[collector/ab739989]]`, `[[collector/35cf414b]]` (ESTC) | Fri pre-market data late | 09:00Z–11:40Z Fri 2026-03-06 (~2h40m) | First bar at 11:40Z ($52.81). Normal small-cap variation. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]`, `[[collector/35cf414b]]` (ESTC) | No pre-market data — 4h gap | 09:00Z–13:00Z Wed 2026-03-04 (~4h) | Self-recovered at 13:00Z ($53.17). |
| ALL collectors (system-wide) | Data ingestion delayed after 14:15Z Mon 2026-03-02 | ~30 min perceived | Self-recovered. Data delayed, not lost. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` (ESTC 5min) | No data 09:20Z–11:55Z Mon 2026-03-02 pre-market | ~2h35m | Self-recovered. Transient Alpaca API issue. |

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## Ready for Promotion

**NONE** — No model has achieved 5 consecutive daily evaluations at >=0.80 yet. Two active tracks approaching this milestone.

## Promotion Candidates (Score >=0.80, Backtest Confirmed, Approaching 5-Eval Threshold)

| Rank | Model | Task | Daily Eval | Full OOS BT | IS DD | OOS DD | DD Dir | cecpp | Ops | WR | Recent Health | Evals>=0.80 | Status |
|------|-------|------|-----------|-------------|-------|--------|--------|-------|-----|-----|---------------|-----------|--------|
| 1 | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.805** | **0.811** | 14.03% | **3.77%** | Imp | 0.971 | 41 | 97.5% | 9 ops/30d, cecpp 0.796, WR 87.5% | **1/5** | Active. FIRST to cross 0.80. Volatile evals. IS DD tight (0.97% headroom). |
| 2 | `[[model/61694274]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.827** | **0.830** | **10.28%** | 13.26% | Worse | 0.921 | 60 | 100% | 0 closed trades/30d | **2/5** | SAFEST IS DD (4.72% headroom). At 60-op cliff. No recent closed trades. |
| 3 | `[[model/2704110c]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.827** | 0.830* | **10.28%** | 13.26% | Worse | 0.921 | 60 | 100% | (same as 61694274) | **2/5** | Twin of 61694274. Identical IS DD profile. |
| 4 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.857** | **0.857** | **18.35%** BLOCKS | **4.04%** | Imp | 0.979 | 61 | 100% | 17 ops/30d, cecpp 0.687, WR 90% | **1*/5** | RECORD SCORE. IS DD 18.35% blocks promotion. Most active recent trading. |
| 5 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | **0.816** | -- | **19.27%** BLOCKS | **9.44%** | Imp | 0.921 | 38 | 100% | -- | **2/5** | IS DD 19.27% blocks promotion. |
| 6 | `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | **0.811** | -- | **19.36%** BLOCKS | **9.44%** | -- | 0.913 | 40 | 96.8% | -- | **2/5** | IS DD 19.36% blocks promotion. |

### Promotion Analysis

**Track A: `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` (EXP-11 tuned scorer)**
- First model EVER to cross 0.80 on daily evaluation (0.8052, Mar 6)
- Full OOS BT refreshed: **0.811** (down from 0.822 on Mar 4 -- GLD Mar 5 selloff impact)
- IS DD 14.03% -- only 0.97% headroom below 15% limit. Under regime change, DD could breach.
- Daily eval highly volatile: 0.649->0.782->0.738->0.805. Range of 0.156 across 4 daily evals.
- Recent 30-day: 9 ops, 87.5% WR, cecpp 0.796, DD 4.24% -- still healthy and actively trading
- **Risk:** Mar 5 dipped to 0.738 (below 0.80). Need 4 more consecutive at >=0.80. Challenging with this volatility.
- **Earliest promotion: ~Mar 10** (4 more daily evals needed, all at >=0.80)

**Track B: `[[model/61694274]]` / `[[model/2704110c]]` (EXP-10 baseline scorer)**
- 2 consecutive evals >=0.80 (0.833->0.827). Need 3 more.
- IS DD **10.28%** -- best IS DD headroom (4.72%) of any model above 0.80
- **CRITICAL: Exactly 60 ops on a 60-op cliff threshold.** If ops drop to 59, trade_count_factor penalty destroys score. Same cliff mechanism that caused 7f7ac2e4's breakout.
- **CRITICAL: No closed trades in recent 30-day period.** The model's 60 completed trades are from earlier in the OOS window. Front-loading concern.
- Slight decline (0.833->0.827) could accelerate if ops drop below threshold.
- **Earliest promotion: ~Mar 9** (3 more daily evals needed)

**IS DD-Blocked Models (Score >=0.80 but IS DD >15%)**

| Model | Score | IS DD | Block Margin | Comment |
|-------|-------|-------|-------------|---------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.857 | **18.35%** | 3.35% over | Record scorer. Needs IS DD <15% to be viable. |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | 0.816 | **19.27%** | 4.27% over | EXP-14 systematic pattern: high IS DD |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | 0.811 | **19.36%** | 4.36% over | EXP-14 systematic pattern: high IS DD |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.794 | **15.25%** | 0.25% over | Marginal breach |

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | Score | Full OOS BT | IS DD | Ops | Evals | Trend | Next Review |
|-------|------|-------|-------------|-------|-----|-------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | 0.776 | **0.791** | **10.28%** | 55 | 2 | +1.7% | Mar 7 -- BT 0.009 from threshold |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | 0.794 | -- | **15.25%** BLOCKS | 43 | 5 | +14.4% surge | Mar 7 -- IS DD blocks |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | 0.770 | -- | 9.76% | 44 | 3 | +41% surge | Mar 7 -- volatile, DD worsens IS->OOS |
| `[[model/9802794d]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | 0.769 | -- | ~19% BLOCKS | 38 | 1 | NEW | Mar 7 -- IS DD blocks |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | 0.702 | 0.717 | **9.64%** | 60 | 5 | Recovered from 0.491 | Mar 7 -- best overall safety, can't reach 0.80 on EXP-10 |
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15) | 0.676 | -- | **9.29%** | 90 | 1 | NEW | Mar 7 -- FIRST EXP-15! Best IS DD headroom |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13) | 0.514 | -- | -- | 79 | 2 | +2% | Mar 8 -- 2nd viable NSGA-III ESTC |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | 0.568 | -- | -- | 144 | 10 | Oscillating | Mar 8 -- far from threshold |
| `[[model/f1df6a17]]` | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13) | 0.318 | -- | -- | 156 | 3 | Stable | Mar 10 -- low score, excellent DD 5.45% |
| `[[model/31bff7f5]]` | `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9) | 0.549 | -- | -- | 89 | 5 | Declining | Mar 10 -- task disabled |
| `[[model/ade6e576]]` | `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline) | 0.537 | -- | -- | 111 | 14 | Flat | Reference model |

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | Score | Trend | MaxDD | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-------|-------|-------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | 0.738 | GLD-correlated bounces (0.754->0.703->0.671->0.685->0.570->0.738) | 13.36% | No | Dying. Score bounces are GLD day artifacts. Recent cecpp ~0.36 collapsed. |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | 0.743 | Same GLD bounce pattern. DD **16.18%** breached. | **16.18%** | No | DEAD. DD breached 15%. cecpp collapse. |
| `[[model/33e3f843]]` | `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2) | 0.582 | 4 consecutive below 0.65 (0.622->0.626->0.633->0.582) | 13.89% | No | FORMALLY DEMOTED. Task disabled. |

## Backtest Summary (Updated Mar 6 18:30Z)

### Full OOS Backtests (Nov 5/6 - Mar 6)

| Model | Score | Sharpe | SQN | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Profit |
|-------|-------|--------|-----|-----|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | **0.857** | 15.47 | 15.47 | **4.04%** | **0.979** | 61 | 100% | $21.50 | $1,161 |
| `[[model/61694274]]` | **0.830** | 10.93 | 10.94 | 13.26% | 0.921 | 60 | 100% | $20.64 | $1,032 |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | **0.811** | 8.05 | 8.06 | **3.77%** | **0.971** | 41 | 97.5% | $32.27 | $1,291 |
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | **0.791** | 10.10 | 10.10 | 13.03% | 0.922 | 58 | 97.9% | $20.87 | $1,002 |

### In-Sample Backtests (~1710 days)

| Model | Score | Sharpe | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Profit | DD Headroom |
|-------|-------|--------|-----|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|-------------|
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | 0.625 | 6.09 | **9.29%** | 0.822 | 1456 | 54.2% | $0.97 | $1,409 | **5.71%** |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | 0.808 | 9.75 | **9.64%** | 0.894 | 371 | 68.0% | -- | $2,069 | **5.36%** |
| `[[model/61694274]]` | 0.786 | 8.74 | **10.28%** | 0.906 | 404 | 62.7% | $5.34 | $2,105 | **4.72%** |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | 0.787 | 8.84 | **10.28%** | 0.906 | 406 | 62.4% | $5.32 | $2,105 | **4.72%** |
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | 0.785 | 8.77 | **10.28%** | 0.903 | 439 | 62.5% | $4.84 | $2,077 | **4.72%** |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | 0.796 | 9.50 | **14.03%** | 0.920 | 303 | 68.2% | -- | $2,055 | **0.97%** |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.802 | 9.81 | **15.25%** BLOCKS | 0.920 | 291 | 73.3% | -- | $1,968 | **-0.25%** |
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.795 | 10.29 | **18.35%** BLOCKS | 0.911 | 335 | 73.9% | $5.33 | $1,774 | **-3.35%** |

### Recent-Period Health (Feb 4 - Mar 6, 30 days)

| Model | Recent Score | Recent cecpp | Recent DD | Recent WR | Recent Ops | Closed Trades? | Health |
|-------|-------------|-------------|-----------|-----------|-----------|----------------|--------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.521 | 0.687 | 4.24% | 90% | 17 | Yes (active) | BEST recent activity |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | 0.172 | 0.796 | 4.24% | 87.5% | 9 | Yes | Active, moderate |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.069 | 0.738 | 4.41% | -- | 7 | No closed | Open positions only |
| `[[model/61694274]]` | 0.032 | 0.685 | 5.74% | -- | 5 | No closed | Open positions only |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. Two Viable Promotion Tracks -- Both Have Risks
**Track A (`[[model/7f7ac2e4]]`, EXP-11):** First to cross 0.80 on daily eval. Strong OOS quality (BT 0.811). Still actively trading recently. IS DD 14.03% is tight (0.97% headroom). Daily eval highly volatile -- the 0.738 dip on Mar 5 shows 5 consecutive at >=0.80 is not guaranteed.

**Track B (`[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]`, EXP-10):** Safest IS DD (10.28%, 4.72% headroom). Two consecutive evals >=0.80. But sitting exactly on the 60-op cliff threshold, and NO closed trades in the recent 30-day window. If the model's trade frequency drops below the threshold, score craters.

**Verdict:** Track A has better recent-period health but tighter IS DD. Track B has better safety margin but front-loading/frequency risk. Neither is ready yet. Monitor closely.

### 2. IS DD Is the Critical Gate -- Pattern Confirmed
5 models have scored >=0.80 but are **blocked by IS DD >15%**: 4fc2c04e (18.35%), 50c0ac0b (19.27%), 19c1f02b (19.36%), 0eca618b (15.25%), and likely 9802794d (~19%). **EXP-11 and EXP-14 models systematically produce high IS DD.** The optimizer finds strong signals but with historically dangerous drawdowns.

Only EXP-10 models (61694274, 2704110c, 50b0d769) consistently show IS DD around 10.28% -- safe with 4.72% headroom.

### 3. EXP-10 IS DD Ceiling at 10.28% -- Task-Level Convergence
All three EXP-10 GLD models (61694274, 2704110c, 50b0d769) converge at **exactly 10.28% IS DD**. This is a task-level property -- the optimizer finds the same structural drawdown boundary regardless of individual model architecture. This makes EXP-10 the safest task for promotion candidates.

### 4. EXP-15 First Result Validates NSGA-III Hypothesis
`[[model/c9647008]]` from `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III on GLD) shows IS DD **9.29%** -- the best IS DD headroom (5.71%) of any model with reasonable OOS performance. OOS score 0.676 is below threshold but it's the first model from a brand-new task. The NSGA-III diversity maintenance appears to be finding lower-DD niches as hypothesised.

### 5. GLD Concentration Risk CONFIRMED
Mar 5-6 pattern proved ALL GLD models move in lockstep: dipped Mar 5, recovered Mar 6. Any GLD-only portfolio is effectively a single-instrument bet. No ESTC model is close to promotion threshold.

### 6. Record Score 0.857 -- Exceptional But Blocked
`[[model/4fc2c04e]]` achieved the highest score in platform history (0.857, SQN 15.47, DD 4.04%, cecpp 0.979). It also has the best recent-period activity (17 ops/30d, 90% WR). However, IS DD 18.35% means this model experienced dangerous drawdowns historically. Promotion impossible without IS DD <15%.

### 7. 33e3f843 Formally Demoted
4 consecutive daily evaluations below 0.65 (0.622->0.626->0.633->0.582). Exceeds 3-consecutive threshold. Task already disabled. Not live -- no portfolio impact.

## IS DD Risk Matrix

| IS DD Range | Models | Promotable? | Task Pattern |
|-------------|--------|------------|--------------|
| < 10% | c9647008 (9.29%), 923a4e31 (9.64%), 48b5cd64 (9.76%) | If scores reach 0.80 | EXP-15 (NSGA-III), EXP-10 |
| 10-14% | 61694274 (10.28%), 2704110c (10.28%), 50b0d769 (10.28%), 7f7ac2e4 (14.03%) | Yes (with headroom concerns for 14%+) | EXP-10, EXP-11 (one model) |
| 15%+ | 0eca618b (15.25%), 4fc2c04e (18.35%), 50c0ac0b (19.27%), 19c1f02b (19.36%) | BLOCKED | EXP-11 (most), EXP-14 (all) |

## Task Quality Summary

| Task | Best Model | Best BT | Viable/Total | IS DD Pattern | Assessment |
|------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------------|------------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (0.857) | 0.857 | 3/4 | Mixed: 14-18% | Highest peaks but IS DD risk. 7f7ac2e4 is the only viable candidate. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | `[[model/61694274]]` (0.827) | 0.830 | 5/8 | **10.28% ceiling** | SAFEST. Consistent IS DD. 61694274/2704110c approaching promotion. |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` (0.816) | -- | 3/4 | **19%+** BLOCKS ALL | High scores but IS DD blocks every model. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15) | `[[model/c9647008]]` (0.676) | -- | 1/2 | **9.29%** | FIRST RESULTS. Best IS DD. NSGA-III hypothesis validated. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13) | `[[model/64a144a1]]` (0.514) | -- | 2/6 | -- | NSGA-III on ESTC. Slow progress. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | `[[model/66806842]]` (0.568) | -- | 1/2 | -- | Oscillating. Far from threshold. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline) | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (0.537) | -- | 1/5 | -- | Reliable control. |

## Summary
- **Total models in system:** 66 (10 new since last cycle)
- **Models scoring >=0.80 on at least 1 eval:** 6 (7f7ac2e4, 61694274, 2704110c, 4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b, 19c1f02b)
- **IS DD-blocked (>=0.80 score but IS DD >15%):** 4 (4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b, 19c1f02b, 0eca618b)
- **Viable promotion candidates (>=0.80 + IS DD <15%):** 3 (7f7ac2e4, 61694274, 2704110c)
- **Consecutive evals at >=0.80:** 7f7ac2e4 (1/5), 61694274/2704110c (2/5)
- **New EXP-15 models:** 2 (c9647008 promising with IS DD 9.29%)
- **Degrading models flagged:** 3 (5c6aede0, 6bd6b1c2, 33e3f843)
- **Estimated earliest promotion:** ~Mar 9-11 (Track B if holds, Track A ~Mar 10)
- **Next critical event:** Mar 7 02:15Z eval batch -- will 61694274/2704110c sustain >=0.80 (3/5)?

# Portfolio Status

## Active Models
| Portfolio | Model | Allocation | Enabled Since | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Orders (24h) | Status |
|-----------|-------|------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------|------------|--------------|--------|
| — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty. No live trading. |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-06 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | ⭐ `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` crossed 0.80 on eval 5 (0.8052) — first EVER daily eval above promotion threshold! But only 1 of 5 required consecutive evals at ≥0.80. Score volatile (0.7384 on Mar 5 bad GLD day). All GLD models crashed Mar 5, recovered Mar 6 — confirms GLD concentration risk. `[[model/0eca618b]]` surged to 0.7940 (0.006 from 0.80). `[[model/48b5cd64]]` surged to 0.7700 (+41%). `[[model/33e3f843]]` 4th consecutive below 0.65 (formal demotion, not live). No models meet promotion criteria yet. |
| 2026-03-04 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | 7f7ac2e4 surged to 0.7824 (gap -0.018). 66806842 streak broken. 33e3f843 2/3 demotion. |
| 2026-03-03 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | 0eca618b anomalous +10.5% to 0.7527. 7f7ac2e4 BT breakthrough (0.810). |
| 2026-02-19 | `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` | — | Portfolio created | Initial setup with `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]`. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100%
- Models pending promotion: 0 (none meet ≥0.80 threshold with 5+ consecutive stable evals)
- Closest to threshold: `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` at **0.8052** (1 of 5 consecutive evals at ≥0.80 — needs 4 more)
- Estimated earliest promotion: **~Mar 11** (if 7f7ac2e4 sustains ≥0.80 on evals 6-9, Mar 7-10)

## Pipeline Leaders (Updated Mar 6 — Post 02:15Z Eval Batch)

| Rank | Model | Instrument | Task | Score | Evals | Trend | SQN | MaxDD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Sharpe | Promotable? |
|------|-------|-----------|------|-------|-------|-------|-----|-------|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|-------------|
| 1 ⭐⭐⭐ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | GLD | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.8052** | 5 | ⬆️ CROSSED 0.80! | 7.90 | **3.77%** | 0.969 | 41 | 97.5% | $31.30 | 7.90 | ✅ 1/5 consecutive at ≥0.80. Needs 4 more. |
| 2 ⭐⭐ | `[[model/0eca618b]]` | GLD | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.7940** | 5 | ⬆️ Surged +14.4% | 8.13 | 13.42% | 0.942 | 43 | 100% | $29.39 | 8.13 | ⚠️ IS DD 15.25% blocks promotion |
| 3 🆕 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | GLD | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | **0.7700** | 3 (2 daily) | ⬆️ +41% surge | 7.64 | 13.25% | 0.923 | 44 | 97.1% | $27.45 | — | 🆕 Too few evals. Watch closely. |
| 4 | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | GLD | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.7023** | 5 | ⬆️ Recovered from 0.4912 | 6.17 | **8.40%** | 0.964 | 60 | 88.9% | $20.53 | — | ✅ Best safety. Cannot reach 0.80 under EXP-10. |
| 5 ⚠️ | `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | GLD | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.7381** | 6 | ⬆️ GLD recovery bounce | — | 13.36% | 0.912 | 53 | — | — | — | ⚠️ DYING (cecpp collapse confirmed) |
| 6 ⚠️ | `[[model/33e3f843]]` | ESTC | `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2) | **0.5823** | 12 | ⬇️ Crashed to 0.58 | — | 13.89% | 0.957 | 121 | — | — | — | ❌ 4 consecutive below 0.65. Demotion. Not live. |
| 7 | `[[model/66806842]]` | ESTC | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | **0.5675** | 10 | → Oscillating | — | 13.26% | 0.918 | 144 | 70.7% | — | — | ↘️ Choppy. Far from threshold. |

## DD Headroom
| Model | Instrument | OOS MaxDD | IS MaxDD | Headroom (OOS) | Headroom (IS) | Risk |
|-------|-----------|-----------|----------|----------------|---------------|------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | GLD | **3.77%** | 14.03% | **11.23%** | 0.97% | ✅ OOS RECORD / ⚠️ IS tight |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | GLD | **8.40%** | 9.64% | **6.60%** | **5.36%** | ✅✅ BEST overall safety |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 | GLD | 13.25% | 9.76% | 1.75% | **5.24%** | ⚠️ DD worsens IS→OOS |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | GLD | 13.42% | **15.25%** | 1.58% | **-0.25%** | 🔴 IS BREACH |
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | GLD | 13.36% | 13.10% | 1.64% | 1.90% | ⚠️ DYING |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | ESTC | 13.26% | — | 1.74% | — | ⚠️ Tight |
| `[[model/33e3f843]]` | ESTC | 13.89% | — | 1.11% | — | ❌ Demoted (not live) |

## Key Observations This Cycle

### 1. ⭐ `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` FIRST EVER Daily Eval Above 0.80
Score 0.8052 on eval 5 (Mar 6 02:15Z). This is the FIRST daily evaluation in Harvester history to exceed the 0.80 promotion threshold. Stats remain exceptional: DD 3.77% (record), cecpp 0.969, WR 97.5%, Exp $31.30, Sharpe 7.90. However, score volatility is concerning — the model dipped to 0.7384 on Mar 5 (bad GLD day) before recovering. Need 4 more consecutive evals at ≥0.80 before promotion.

### 2. GLD Concentration Risk CONFIRMED
Mar 5-6 pattern proves ALL GLD models move in lockstep. Mar 5 selloff impact: 7f7ac2e4 (-5.6%), 0eca618b (-7.7%), 923a4e31 (-22%), 48b5cd64 (-0.9%), 5c6aede0 (-16.8%). Mar 6 recovery: ALL bounced back. If multiple GLD models go live, they'll dip together — single-instrument concentration risk.

### 3. `[[model/0eca618b]]` Nearly Hit 0.80 (0.7940)
Surged +14.4% from 0.6940 (Mar 5 crash) to 0.7940 — only 0.006 from threshold. But IS DD 15.25% permanently blocks promotion.

### 4. `[[model/48b5cd64]]` Fast Riser
Surged to 0.7700 (+41% from daily eval 2). Only 2 proper daily evals — way too early to assess. Watch for first-eval inflation correction.

### 5. `[[model/33e3f843]]` — Formal Demotion (4 consecutive < 0.65)
Score crashed to 0.5823 on Mar 6. Now 4 consecutive evals below 0.65 (threshold: 3+). Formal demotion status. NOT live — no portfolio action needed.

## Risks & Concerns
1. **GLD concentration**: ALL top candidates are GLD. No ESTC model close to promotion. Single-instrument correlated risk.
2. **Score volatility**: 7f7ac2e4's eval-to-eval swings (±20%) make 5 consecutive at ≥0.80 challenging.
3. **IS DD headroom for 7f7ac2e4**: Only 0.97% headroom (14.03% IS DD vs 15% limit).
4. **Promotion timeline**: Earliest ~Mar 11 IF 7f7ac2e4 sustains ≥0.80 for 4 more evals. Mar 5 dip shows this is not guaranteed.
5. **No diversification**: Entire pipeline is GLD-heavy. Need ESTC models to mature before multi-model portfolio.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Avg Sharpe | Avg MaxDD | Avg Ops | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|------------|-----------|---------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.76 | ~11.9 | ~4.0% | ~54 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.857** ⭐⭐⭐) | 4 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐⭐ **NEW RECORD.** 4fc2c04e at 0.857 (highest ever). 7f7ac2e4 crossed 0.80 (0.805 daily eval). |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD, mut=0.35, tuned) | graph | ~0.80 | ~9.4 | ~10.6% | ~40 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` (0.833) | 4 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐ **3 models above 0.80!** 50c0ac0b (0.816/0.833), 19c1f02b (0.811/0.810). IS DD 19%+ blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.69 | ~8.7 | ~12.3% | ~55 | `[[model/61694274]]` (**0.833**) | 8 (4 viable) | ⭐⭐ **SURPRISE.** 61694274+2704110c scoring 0.827/0.833 with IS DD **10.28%** ✅. Best promotion safety profile. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: ESTC, mut=0.35) | graph | ~0.42 | ~5.3 | ~13.3% | ~130 | `[[model/66806842]]` (0.567) | 2 viable | ⚠️ 66806842 declining. Far from 0.80. Pop 165. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC, mut=0.6) | graph | ~0.33 | ~4.0 | ~10.5% | ~100 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. Pop 200/200. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9: ESTC DD-weighted, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.46 | **Pop death spiral** (200→88→116→95). Models declining. | 2 | ❌ **DISABLED Mar 6.** |
| `[[task/79109412]]` (EXP-12: SLV, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.38 | ALL DOA. DD 37%+. SLV structural volatility. | 3 (0 viable) | ❌ DISABLED Mar 4 |
| `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2: ESTC, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.48 | Systemic DD. | 6 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 3 |
| `[[task/7e17cdee]]` (EXP-8: NVDA, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.22 | All below 0.27. NVDA doesn't support long-short. | 4 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 2 |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: mut=0.6) | Control/baseline | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Reliable. Pop 200/200. Stable. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: mut=0.35) | Intermediate rate for ESTC trajectory | 2026-02-23 | ⚠️ 66806842 declining (0.567). Pop 165. Far from 0.80. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | GLD produces viable long-short models | 2026-02-27 | ⭐⭐ **61694274/2704110c at 0.827/0.833!** IS DD 10.28%. Best promotion safety. Pop 200. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD scorer-tuned, mut=0.3) | Lowering trade_count_factor removes GLD frequency penalty | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ **4fc2c04e at 0.857! 7f7ac2e4 crossed 0.80 (0.805).** Pop 200. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: NSGA-III ESTC, mut=0.35) | NSGA-III maintains better population diversity on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 at 0.504/0.514. f1df6a17 stable at 0.318. Pop 200. |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD, mut=0.35, tuned scorer) | mut=0.35 improves GLD model diversity/robustness | 2026-03-04 | ⭐⭐ **3 models above 0.80!** But IS DD 19%+ blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III on GLD, tuned scorer) 🆕 | **NSGA-III diversity maintenance finds low-IS-DD GLD models** | **2026-03-06** | 🆕 **NEW.** Combines best instrument + scorer + NSGA-III selection + improved features. |

## Model Score Leaderboard (Mar 6 Evals)

| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Prev | Δ | OOS DD | IS DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Trend |
|------|-------|------|-------|------|---|--------|-------|-------|-----|-----|-------|
| 1 🆕 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.857** | — | — | **4.04%** ✅✅ | **18.35%** ❌ | 0.980 | 54 | 100% | 🆕 **HIGHEST SCORE EVER.** IS DD blocks promotion. |
| 2 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.816** | 0.833 | -2.0% | **9.44%** ✅ | **19.27%** ❌ | 0.921 | 38 | 100% | 2 evals ≥ 0.80 |
| 3 | `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.827** | 0.833 | -0.7% | 13.26% | **10.28%** ✅ | 0.912 | 60 | 100% | ⭐ 2 evals ≥ 0.80. **Best IS DD headroom (4.72%).** |
| 4 | `[[model/19c1f02b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.811** | 0.810 | +0.1% | — | **19.36%** ❌ | 0.913 | 31 | 96.8% | 2 evals ≥ 0.80. IS DD blocks. |
| 5 ⬆ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.805** | 0.738 | **+9.1%** | ~3.77% ✅ | 14.03% ⚠️ | 0.970 | 42 | 97.6% | ⭐⭐ **CROSSED 0.80!** 1 eval ≥ 0.80 of 5 needed. |
| 6 | `[[model/2704110c]]` ⭐ | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.827** | 0.833 | -0.7% | 13.26% | — | 0.912 | 60 | 100% | Twin of 61694274. 2 evals ≥ 0.80. |
| 7 | `[[model/0eca618b]]` | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.794** | 0.752 | +5.6% | 13.42% | **15.25%** ❌ | 0.948 | 44 | 100% | Rising but IS DD blocks. |
| 8 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.770** | 0.545 | +41.3% | 13.25% | 9.76% ✅ | 0.923 | 44 | — | Big recovery. DD worsens IS→OOS. |
| 9 | `[[model/9802794d]]` 🆕 | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.769** | — | — | — | **19.05%** ❌ | — | — | — | 🆕 First eval. IS DD blocks. |
| 10 | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.702** | 0.630 | +11.4% | 8.40% ✅ | 9.64% ✅ | 0.966 | 63 | 87.7% | Safe but penalized by EXP-10 scorer. |

## Promotion Candidates (Updated)

| Model | Task | Latest Eval | Evals ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | DD Direction | Status |
|-------|------|------------|-------------|-------|--------|-------------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | **0.805** | **1**/5 | 14.03% ⚠️ | 3.77% ✅ | ✅ Improves | Active candidate — tight IS DD |
| `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 | 0.827 | **2**/5 | **10.28%** ✅ | 13.26% | ❌ Worsens | **SAFEST CANDIDATE** — best IS DD headroom |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 | 0.816 | **2**/5 | 19.27% ❌ | **9.44%** ✅ | ✅ Improves | High IS DD risk |
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | **0.857** | **1**/5 | **18.35%** ❌ | 4.04% ✅ | ✅ Improves | Highest score ever, IS DD blocks |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 | 0.811 | **2**/5 | 19.36% ❌ | — | — | IS DD blocks |

## Task Optimization Health

| Task | Best Fitness | Pop Size | Errors | Health |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 (GLD) | 0.543 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Healthiest |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | 0.706 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Stable |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 (NSGA-III) | 0.239 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Full pop |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 (GLD tuned) | 0.621 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 (GLD+mut=0.35) | 0.643 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` EXP-5 | 0.552 | 165/200 | 0 | ✅ OK |
| `[[task/1c326293]]` EXP-9 (DD-wt) | 0.819 | **95/200** ❌ | 0 | ❌ **DISABLED** — pop death spiral |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 (NSGA-III GLD) 🆕 | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` Crosses 0.80 — First Model at Promotion Threshold ⭐⭐ **HEADLINE**
Daily eval on Mar 6: **0.8052**. First model in platform history to cross 0.80. Still needs 4 more consecutive evals ≥ 0.80 for promotion (earliest ~Mar 10). Full OOS BT previously confirmed at 0.822. IS DD 14.03% (0.97% headroom — tight).

### 2. `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` Sets New Record: 0.857 ⭐⭐⭐
Brand new EXP-11 model scored **0.857** on first eval — highest score in platform history. OOS DD 4.04% (record), cecpp 0.980, SQN 15.47, 54W/0L. However, IS DD **18.35%** exceeds 15% limit and blocks promotion.

### 3. EXP-10 Produces 0.83 Models — With Safe IS DD ⭐⭐
`[[model/61694274]]` and `[[model/2704110c]]` from EXP-10 (baseline GLD scorer) scored 0.827/0.833 on their first two daily evals. Crucially, IS DD is **10.28%** — the best IS DD headroom of any model above 0.80. DD worsens IS→OOS (10.28%→13.26%) but stays within 15%.

### 4. EXP-14 Produces 3 Models Above 0.80 — But IS DD Blocks All
`[[model/50c0ac0b]]` (0.816/0.833), `[[model/19c1f02b]]` (0.811/0.810), `[[model/9802794d]]` (0.769). All have IS DD ~19% (far above 15%). The mut=0.35 on GLD produces high scores but higher IS risk. OOS DD for 50c0ac0b is excellent (9.44%).

### 5. EXP-9 Disabled — DD-Weighted Scorer Kills Population on ESTC
Population dropped 116→95 (continuing death spiral pattern 200→88→116→95). All models declining. DD-weighted scorer creates unsustainable selection pressure on ESTC.

### 6. EXP-15 Created: NSGA-III on GLD ⭐
New experiment combines: GLD (best instrument) + tuned scorer (40,480,120) + NSGA-III selection (divisions=4) + improved features `["score","cecpp","num_operations","expectancy"]`. Hypothesis: NSGA-III diversity will explore niches with lower IS DD.

## IS DD Risk Analysis — Critical New Pattern

| IS DD Range | Models | Promotable? | Pattern |
|-------------|--------|------------|---------|
| < 10% | 48b5cd64 (9.76%), 923a4e31 (9.64%) | ✅ If scores reach 0.80 | DD worsens IS→OOS |
| 10-14% | 7f7ac2e4 (14.03%), 61694274 (10.28%) | ⚠️ Tight but possible | Mixed DD direction |
| 15%+ | 4fc2c04e (18.35%), 50c0ac0b (19.27%), 19c1f02b (19.36%), 0eca618b (15.25%), 9802794d (19.05%) | ❌ Blocked | DD improves IS→OOS but IS too high |

**Key insight:** Higher IS DD models often have BETTER OOS DD (improving direction). But IS DD >15% means the model experienced dangerous drawdowns historically — live deployment risk.

## Mutation Rate Performance (Updated)

| Rate | Task(s) | Best Score | IS DD Pattern | OOS DD Pattern | Assessment |
|------|---------|-----------|--------------|---------------|------------|
| **0.3** | EXP-10, EXP-11 | **0.857** (4fc2c04e) | Mixed (10.28-18.35%) | Low (3.77-13.26%) | ✅ Highest peaks, mixed IS risk |
| **0.35** | EXP-14, EXP-5, EXP-13 | 0.833 (50c0ac0b) | High (19%+) | Good (9.44%) | ⚠️ High IS DD pattern |
| **0.6** | Baseline | ~0.537 | — | 9.17% | ✅ Safe, low peak |

## Infrastructure
- **7 active tasks** (Baseline, EXP-5, EXP-10, EXP-11, EXP-13, EXP-14, EXP-15 🆕) + 10 disabled
- **35 workers active** (7 tasks × 5 workers)
